trust_model.olp_role: authenticated protocol client and policy enforcement point
trust_model.connector_role: untrusted provider adapter server isolated from OLP processes

olp_ephemeral.description: OLP resolves an immutable encrypted credential revision and delivers plaintext only on the authenticated channel to the configured instance.

external_reference.description: The connector resolves a bounded opaque reference to an immutable secret-manager version using its own workload identity.

rpc_operations.name: Handshake
rpc_operations.purpose: authenticate and negotiate exact connector identity, protocol, features, and bounds

rpc_operations.name: Configure
rpc_operations.purpose: bind one immutable provider revision, config digest, secret authority revisions, certified capability set, and network/workload policy to an instance handle

rpc_operations.name: Deconfigure
rpc_operations.purpose: atomically reject new executions for one configuration and request bounded drain and cleanup before enforced instance termination

rpc_operations.name: DiscoverModels
rpc_operations.purpose: return bounded model inventory for the exact configured provider revision

rpc_operations.name: CertifyCapability
rpc_operations.purpose: run one server-owned bounded probe for an exact model, operation, surface, and mode tuple

rpc_operations.name: CheckHealth
rpc_operations.purpose: report connector process and configured-instance health without exposing secrets or provider content

rpc_operations.name: Execute
rpc_operations.purpose: execute one pinned canonical attempt and stream bounded input media, output events or result, and terminal usage

rpc_operations.name: Cancel
rpc_operations.purpose: idempotently cancel an execution when stream cancellation alone cannot confirm connector cleanup
